entries.title: DuckDuckGo installs are up 30% as users reject being ‘force-fed’ Google’s AI Search
entries.description: Google overhauled Search at I/O 2026, replacing blue links with AI agents. The backlash has been swift. DuckDuckGo app installs spiked 30% as users seek a way out.

entries.title: OpenRouter more than doubles valuation to $1.3B in a year
entries.description: OpenRouter has raised a $113 million Series B led by CapitalG. Its 5x growth in usage over six months indicates the multi-AI-model future is here.

entries.title: This startup is betting India’s gig economy can train the world’s robots

entries.title: Universal Music Group and TikTok renew agreement to combat unauthorized AI music
entries.description: For years, UMG has pushed platforms, streaming services, and AI companies to implement stricter content moderation policies.

entries.title: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Early Bird ticket rates end May 29
entries.description: Save up to $410 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass before prices increase on May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register here to join the tech epicenter in San Francisco.

entries.title: Everyone is navigating AI security in real time — even Google
entries.description: We're in the transition period -- all of us.

entries.title: Xreal, Google’s smart glasses partner, thinks it has finally mastered this notoriously tricky industry
entries.description: Chi Xu, the founder and CEO of Xreal, thinks the smart glasses business has finally reached a turning point.

entries.title: I tried Amazon’s Bee wearable and am both intrigued and slightly creeped out
entries.description: Like other AI wearables, Amazon's Bee offers an odd combination of convenience and privacy anxiety.

entries.title: Ferrari is using IBM’s AI to create F1 superfans
entries.description: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP take TechCrunch inside how they are redefining the fan experience.

entries.title: Elon Musk has given up on solar power (on Earth)
entries.description: Elon Muks's xAI has gone all in on natural gas, while SpaceX is obsessed with orbital data centers. What happened to the "solar-electric economy" he promised?

entries.title: What ClickUp’s mass layoff tells us about the future of work
entries.description: The nine-year-old startup is replacing hundreds of employees with thousands of AI agents.

entries.title: The pope’s AI encyclical isn’t really about AI
entries.description: Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical uses AI as a lens to diagnose older problems: concentrated power, eroding democracy, and a tech elite that shapes the world to its own advantage.

entries.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close in days: Apply before May 27
entries.description: The deadline to apply or nominate for Startup Battlefield 200 is May 27. This is your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100,000. Apply now.

entries.title: 5 days left: Save up to $410 on TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 passes before prices increase
entries.description: Early Bird savings for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 in San Francisco end May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now to save up to $410 before prices increase.

entries.title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
entries.description: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.

entries.title: Google goes for the glitter with disco-ball icons: ‘Are y’all sure you still want this?’
entries.description: You can now disco ball-ify your entire Pixel home screen, says Google.

entries.title: How VCs and founders use inflated ‘ARR’ to crown AI startups
entries.description: Some AI startups are stretching traditional revenue metrics when talking about progress publicly. And their investors are fully aware.

entries.title: Elon Musk can’t hear you over the sound of his $1.75 trillion IPO

entries.title: You can no longer Google the word ‘disregard’
entries.description: After Google Search's AI update, the word "disregard" now effectively breaks the search interface.

entries.title: We tried Google’s AI glasses and they’re almost there
entries.description: Google demoed prototype Android XR glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and other information directly into your field of view.

news.title: DuckDuckGo installs are up 30% as users reject being ‘force-fed’ Google’s AI Search
news.description: Google overhauled Search at I/O 2026, replacing blue links with AI agents. The backlash has been swift. DuckDuckGo app installs spiked 30% as users seek a way out.

news.title: OpenRouter more than doubles valuation to $1.3B in a year
news.description: OpenRouter has raised a $113 million Series B led by CapitalG. Its 5x growth in usage over six months indicates the multi-AI-model future is here.

news.title: Universal Music Group and TikTok renew agreement to combat unauthorized AI music

news.title: The pope’s AI encyclical isn’t really about AI
news.description: Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical uses AI as a lens to diagnose older problems: concentrated power, eroding democracy, and a tech elite that shapes the world to its own advantage.
